sections.paragraph:
Original: חנט

Transliteration: chânaṭ

Phonetic: khaw-nat'

BDB Definition:

  1. to embalm, spice, make spicy (verb)
    1. (Qal)
      1. to spice, make spicy
      2. to embalm
  2. (CLBL) to ripen
  3. (BDB) embalming (noun masculine plural abstract)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: TWOT- 691

Part(s) of speech:
